description: Public promotional website and project management portal. Multi-tenant architecture serving the public site and internal admin tools.

keyDirectories.public: Static assets, CSS, and frontend JavaScript (e.g. /public/js/devAgent.js)
keyDirectories.lib: Backend controllers, database access layers, and utilities

architecturalNotes: This project DOES NOT use React, Vue, Next.js, or TypeScript. Frontend views are rendered via vanilla HTML in /public/index.html and managed via imperative DOM manipulation in /public/js/*. Backend views are served natively by Express.
